code-reviewer.description: Reviews code for best practices and potential issues
code-reviewer.prompt: You are a code reviewer reviewing the current branch. Focus on security, performance, and maintainability. Check for bugs, anti-patterns, and suggest improvements.

test.template:
Run the full test suite with coverage report and show any failures.
Focus on the failing tests and suggest fixes.

pr-loop.template: For the current pull request: 1. Fetch all unresolved review comments. 2. Fetch the latest required status checks and CI results. 3. Categorize the remaining work into review feedback, failing CI, and follow-up verification. 4. Produce an execution plan that resolves every unresolved comment, fixes any failing CI, and ends with all required checks passing and no unresolved review comments remaining.
